metadata.description: Knowledge Vault plugin for Claude Code — project-scoped knowledge base with academic collection via MCP, Zotero integration, and PDF enrichment via Unpaywall and/or Sci-Hub (opt-in)

plugins.name: knowledge-vault
plugins.description: Project-scoped knowledge base with ingestion (URL, Zotero, PubMed/Scholar), PDF enrichment via Unpaywall and/or Sci-Hub (opt-in), compilation, querying, and Obsidian browsing.
